meta.title: Usukhbayar — Product Engineer · Frontend & Mobile
meta.description: Product engineer focused on frontend and mobile. Designs thoughtfully, ships real products. Based in Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia.

hero.subcopy: Frontend and mobile products with a product mindset — clear interfaces, solid engineering, shipped for real use.

about.label: About
about.headline: Thoughtful design. Practical engineering.
about.intro: I'm Usukhbayar — a product engineer based in Ulaanbaatar. I focus on frontend and mobile, and I care most about software people actually use.
story: CS student at the National University of Mongolia (class of 2027). Self-taught by shipping — not by waiting for a syllabus to catch up.
Through Hustle Hive LLC I build education and consumer products end to end. The bar is simple: something people open again.

principles.title: Ship real software
principles.detail: Demos are fine for learning. Products have to hold up for real people.

principles.title: Clarity over cleverness
principles.detail: Interfaces and code should be understandable first — clever second.

principles.title: Own the full path
principles.detail: From problem to production: product decisions, UI, and the systems underneath.

about.nowBody: Shipping products through Hustle Hive while finishing my degree. Open to product roles and selected freelance work where craft matters.

timeline.title: Started from zero
timeline.detail: Self-taught foundations — small projects and the habit of finishing.

timeline.title: Left the tutorials behind
timeline.detail: Moved to work that had to hold up for real users.

timeline.title: Focused on product stack
timeline.detail: Went deep on React, Next.js, React Native, and TypeScript.

timeline.title: Building end to end
timeline.detail: Running Hustle Hive — ideas from problem to production.

work.label: Selected Works
work.headline: More products.
work.intro: Supporting work — real software with clear problems, not a gallery of mockups.

featured.label: Featured project
featured.title: SparkXP
featured.summary: A gamified English-learning app for Mongolian students and schools — lessons, spaced-repetition practice, and an AI buddy that keeps learners coming back.
featured.problem: English learning in Mongolia is fragmented — static content, thin practice, and little to keep students motivated day to day.
featured.solution: SparkXP turns learning into a game: structured lessons, vocabulary with spaced repetition, XP, streaks, and leaderboards, plus an AI buddy for text and voice practice — with classes and assignments for teachers.
featured.outcome: In active development — a React Native app with a NestJS API and admin dashboard, building toward launch; measured results will be added once they exist.

sparkxp.title: SparkXP
sparkxp.summary: Gamified English learning for Mongolian students and schools — lessons, practice, and an AI buddy.

caseStudy.placeholderNote: Full case study details and screens will land here as real assets and copy are ready. Nothing here is invented for effect.
caseStudy.galleryNote: Brand and in-app artwork from SparkXP. Product screens will be added as they are captured.

sparkxp.overview: SparkXP is a gamified English-learning app for Mongolian students and schools, built to make daily practice feel like play.
sparkxp.problem: English learning in Mongolia is fragmented — static content, thin practice, and little to keep students motivated day to day.
sparkxp.solution: A React Native app with structured lessons, spaced-repetition vocabulary, XP, streaks, and leaderboards, plus an AI buddy for text and voice practice — backed by a NestJS API, PostgreSQL, and Redis, with an admin dashboard for teachers and content.
sparkxp.outcome: In active development across the student, teacher, and admin experiences; measured results will be added once it launches.

beauty-corner.overview: Beauty Corner is a salon booking product covering discovery, scheduling, and day-to-day operations.
beauty-corner.problem: Salons and clients still rely on calls and ad-hoc messaging to book — slow for staff, unclear for customers.
beauty-corner.solution: A React Native app with a Node/PostgreSQL backend for browsing, booking, and running appointments in one flow.
beauty-corner.outcome: Results will be documented with real usage details when available.

qr-menu.overview: QR Menu replaces paper menus with a fast, scannable digital experience for hospitality venues.
qr-menu.problem: Printed menus are slow to update, costly to reprint, and weak during peak hours or contact-sensitive contexts.
qr-menu.solution: A web product where guests scan a QR code and get a current menu without installing an app.
qr-menu.outcome: Case metrics pending real deployment notes.

ai-image-studio.overview: AI Image Studio is a focused tool for generating and refining images with AI — oriented around a clear workflow.
ai-image-studio.problem: Many AI image tools overwhelm with options. The path from prompt to usable output gets buried in UI.
ai-image-studio.solution: A studio layout that prioritizes generation, iteration, and export — practical defaults, minimal chrome.
ai-image-studio.outcome: Measured outcomes will be listed when they exist.
